summary: Xenia iteration-2 full-stack regression + new XeniaOS interactive slot. Backend 5/5 pytest pass (root, POST /api/access valid, idempotent, invalid 422, GET list). Frontend: all 13 root testids present (hero, act-1..7, act-product, request-access, footer, xn-nav, command-centre). Scrolled to slot 6.2 → xenia-os mounts, os-sidebar present. All 18 modules render via sidebar nav (nav-{id} → module-{id} verified for dashboard/leads/companies/contacts/research/signals/campaigns/email/chat/tasks/pipeline/analytics/reports/team/integrations/notifications/activity/settings). CompanyDetail opens for Northlake via company-c-northlake and via signal-b1; detail-draft-outreach navigates to module-email with c-northlake preselected in <email-company>. ⌘K opens command-palette, filter 'Companies' narrows list, clicking palette-item-mod-companies switches modules, Escape closes. Pipeline: 5 columns (New/Researching/Qualified/Contacted/Meeting booked) all found with company cards. Tasks: task-toggle-t1 flips to done state (bg-white class applied). Integrations: integration-toggle-int1 flips pill from Connected → Not connected. AI Chat: chat-input+chat-send appends user msg and Xenia keyword reply (~500ms). Analytics: 2 SVG polylines inside module-analytics. Request Access: POST /api/access with unique email returns 200 and access-confirmation ('You're on the list') renders.

issues: Hero Aperture 3D object visually overlaps the Request Access card at the very end of scroll (glowing sphere sits behind the confirmation panel). Card is legible but the composition feels crowded. Consider fading the Aperture out below slot 8 or nudging the RequestAccess card up.

action_items: (Minor) Fix React hydration warning caused by <span> wrappers appearing inside <option> elements in EmailWriter's To/Company/Tone selects. Root cause: emergent dev-tool instrumentation adds a <span data-ve-dynamic style='display:contents'> around dynamic expressions like {x.name} inside <option>. Options can only contain text. In prod build this instrumentation may not run, but the warning is noisy in dev. Workaround: compute the label string outside JSX (const label = `${x.name} — ${x.title}`) and render {label} as the sole child, OR use a non-native custom Select (Radix/shadcn) so instrumentation targets a <div/> rather than <option>.
(Optional polish) Consider hiding/fading the 3D Aperture behind the RequestAccess section so the confirmation card is not layered on top of the hero object.
critical_code_review_comments: XeniaOS.jsx is well structured: MODULES dict keyed by id, keyboard listener handles both Meta+K and Ctrl+K + Escape (matches spec).
OSContext.jsx: draftFor(companyId, contactId) correctly sets draftContext, switches module to 'email', and closes selectedCompany — cross-module deep link works.

EmailWriter.jsx: dynamic children of <option> ({x.name} — {x.title} and {companyById(cid)?.name}) trigger a React hydration warning when the emergent dev instrumentation wraps them with <span>. Precompute the label string into a variable to keep <option>'s child a single text node. (Same fix for the Company select's inner expression.)
Pipeline.jsx: drag/drop uses HTML5 drag events with onDragOver preventDefault + onDrop – standard pattern, fine.
AIChat.jsx: reply matcher is deterministic and testable; async delay is 500ms – Playwright waits ~1s and always sees the response.
Companies.jsx: `os-card` is a <button> — good for a11y and keyboard nav. openCompany(c.id) fires cleanly.
CommandPalette.jsx: input auto-focus + Escape handled at window level in XeniaOS – palette-input is properly focused on open. Filtering is case-insensitive.
Experience.jsx viewport-slot mapping is much better this iteration; slot 6 = product interlude → xenia-os region.
server.py unchanged from iteration_1: still idempotent, still excludes _id via projection. Deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') still present – non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ prefixed AccessRequest row added during e2e run. Harmless (lead-capture collection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. XeniaOS is fully client-side; mock data in /app/frontend/src/os/data.js. Reach OS by window.scrollTo({top: window.innerHeight * 6.2, behavior: 'instant'}) then scroll [data-testid='xenia-os'] into view. IMPORTANT: reveal-on-scroll sections fade in with opacity animation — Playwright's default `wait_for_selector` (state='visible') can time out even when the element is attached and painted. Use either state='attached' or wait_for_function on document.querySelector, and check boundingClientRect + computed style manually. All 18 nav-{id}/module-{id} testids exist. Command palette listens for Meta+K OR Ctrl+K globally on window. Draft flow: click detail-draft-outreach — draftFor() switches module to 'email' and preselects company (verify via [data-testid='email-company'] value === 'c-northlake'). One benign console error from dev-instrumentation hydration warning; safe to filter out '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' when counting real errors.
